title: Zoni's Gunpowder Ore
description: Just a simple mod that let's you mine gunpowder.
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

Now you can mine Gunpowder!


Have you ever felt like you needed lots of gunpowder but you didn't want to farm creepers?

Now, by using this mod, a gunpowder ore will spawn in your world in a similar way to coal and lapis.

 

This ore only spawns in the Overworld on Stone and Deepstone layers.

The drops are affected by fortune and give XP.

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
